market_overview.headline: All major indices in Full Bear structure with both SPY and QQQ showing potential bullish crossover alerts amid geopolitical tensions.
market_overview.detail: Only 41% of stocks in Full Bull vs 36% in Full Bear, with BTC down -48% from fair value signaling extreme risk-off sentiment. Both SPY and QQQ EMAs compressed with bullish cross potential, but Iran-Hormuz crisis keeping markets defensive.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Tech Leading Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Semiconductor and optical components dominating momentum rankings with LITE up 63% vs 21W and storage/networking plays showing explosive gains. Energy sector maintains perfect 100% bullish bias.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Dominant, Tech Services Under Severe Pressure

strongest.note: Perfect bullish setup with Iran-Hormuz tensions boosting oil plays
Infrastructure and services benefiting from geopolitical instability
Mixed performance with semiconductor momentum offsetting chip weakness

weakest.note: Software and cloud plays getting crushed in risk-off environment
Auto and luxury goods facing complete breakdown
Banks under pressure despite some individual reversals

sector_analysis.detail: Clear flight to energy/defense amid Middle East crisis, while growth sectors face severe distribution. Classic risk-off rotation pattern.

items.text: Iran-Hormuz deadline Tuesday night creates binary geopolitical risk event
BTC -48% from fair value signals extreme risk-off that could intensify
Technology Services 87.5% bearish — secular growth story under threat
Consumer durables 100% bearish suggests economic stress broadening

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Iran-Hormuz Strait crisis dominated with Trump's Tuesday night deadline for reopening, driving energy sector surge and broad risk-off sentiment. Despite some successful tanker passages and rescue operations, geopolitical tensions kept defensive rotation intact while potential Iran deal hopes provided modest relief.

items.text: Trump ultimatum to Iran over Strait of Hormuz creates binary Tuesday deadline risk
Energy complex rallied on supply disruption fears and OPEC+ output boost pledge
Defense stocks outperformed on escalating Middle East military operations
Tech mega-caps sold despite some crossover alerts as risk-off dominates growth
Iran drone attacks on Gulf petrochemical facilities amplified supply concerns
